Video.summary: The Huntington Center in Toledo ignites with Ohio Octane as Round 11 of the Freestyle Mania Championship Series gets underway. In a high-stakes showdown that blends the raw power of Monster Jam with elite freestyle motocross, eight top-tier teams battle for supremacy on a track described as "sticky like bubble gum". Watch as Weston Anderson in Grave Digger attempts to set a blistering pace against fierce competition from Fernando Martinez in El Toro Loco and hometown hero Chuckie Pauken. From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying maneuvers of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every moment is a quest for the critical points needed to crown the night's overall champion.
Video.title: Huntington Center - Toledo, OH

Video.summary: The Great Clip’s Mohawk Warrior’s Bryce Kenny goes for his second event championship of the season. While Adam Anderson looks for another dominant win and complete control of the series points lead. Find out who ends up on top as Stadium Championship Series Red roars into Lincoln Finanical Field.
Video.title: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA

Video.summary: It's been 30 years of Monster Jam in Detroit, will Adam Anderson claim the series tonight?
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue from Indianapolis as Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson looks to extend his racing winning streak as Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga tries to win back-to-back Overall Event Championships. Meanwhile Cynthia Gauthier attempts to guide the Lucas Stabilizer to her third freestyle win of the season.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Monster Jam kicks off the 2016 in Atlanta, Georgia at the Dome.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Don't miss all the racing action from the Georgia Dome, on January 10, 2004.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Special 2 hours with all the racing and freestyle action from Raymond James Stadium on February 1, 2020.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2009 season continues with freestyle action from Lucas Oil Stadium on January 24, 2009.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Image.alt: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle
Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle
Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Levi's Stadium is soaked from the rain and creates a rather difficult track for the drivers to play on. Watch as the Jammer's skills are put to the test!
Video.title: Levi's Stadium - Santa Clara, CA

Video.summary: Buckle up, hold on tight, and don't miss Monster Jam's freestyle action from Reliant Stadium, on February 5, 2005.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 7 of the Stadium Championship Series, at NRG Stadium in Houston, TX.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads across the border to the streets of Montreal, Canada, at Olympic Stadium for the first time in almost a decade.
Video.title: Olympic Stadium - Montreal, Quebec

Video.summary: Monster Jam kicks off the 2024 season with the Superstar Challenge in Anaheim, California. Sixteen of the sport’s biggest stars compete on two teams through three competitions. Krysten Anderson looks to lead Team Neon to victory against Bari Musawwir’s Team Nitro. Who will be named the Most Valuable Driver? Find out when Monster Jam brings this exciting team format to Angel Stadium.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: 14 Monster Jam superstars duke it out for the top spots in racing and two wheel skills.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing and Two-Wheel

Image.alt: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing and Two-Wheel
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing and Two-Wheel
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing and Two-Wheel

Video.summary: Watch as our Monster Truck drivers look to make their mark in front of the sold-out crowd at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Tonight, the showdown between your favorite trucks and drivers continues with more epic racing action from Trans World Dome in St. Louis.
Video.title: Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Video.summary: The Astrodome is hot with anticipation as your favorite trucks and drivers prepare for freestyle action in Houston, TX during the 2001 Monster Jam season!
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Who will it be that steps up to the plate? Freestyle galore from the Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena Series in 25 continues with round 20 at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas, NV.
Video.title: Thomas & Mack Center - Las Vegas, NV

Video.summary: Monster Jam Primetime gets heated in San Antonio for Round 8 of Stadium Championship East.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam Primetime continues with more fun and action in Arlington, TX.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: He is vengeance... he is the night... he is the Batman Monster Jam truck! Experience the ultimate tribute to Gotham's Caped Crusader with the BEST freestyle runs and jaw-dropping stunts captured. This compilation proves why The Dark Knight is the hero Monster Jam deserves!
Video.title: Batman Highlights Compilation

Video.summary: Don't miss the best moments of racing and freestyle World Finals XIII!
Video.title: Best of World Finals XIII

Video.summary: What better way to celebrate Unicorn Day than with Monster Jam's very own Sparkle Smash?! Check out Sparkle Smash and the best 2024 and 2025 freestyles, two-wheel skills, sky wheelies, races, and donuts from our favorite unicorn on wheels.
Video.title: Best Of Sparkle Smash
